description_long: This object is a vintage Luxor ABC 80 fax machine with a rectangular, slightly sloped body in a light beige color. The front features a full QWERTY keyboard with white keys and several prominent orange keys, likely for special functions. The top rear section has a large, ribbed black vent or grill, possibly for cooling or paper feed, and the surface is smooth and hard. The left and right sides are angled, giving the machine a streamlined, wedge-like profile, while the back is dominated by the black vent area. The branding 'Luxor' and 'ABC 80' are visible on the front left and right corners, respectively, and there are no visible numeric keypads or display screens. The overall design is utilitarian, with all interactive elements grouped on the front face for easy access.
description: A vintage Luxor ABC 80 fax machine with a beige body, white and orange keys, and a large black vent at the rear. The design is streamlined and functional, with all controls on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard with white and orange keys, Luxor branding, and a sloped beige surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled profile and the black vent at the rear, with the keyboard partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the large black vent, with only the tops of the orange keys visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the wedge-shaped profile and the keyboard's orange keys, mirroring the left side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel consists of a full QWERTY keyboard with white keys and several orange keys grouped at the left and right ends. All controls are located on the front sloped surface, with no visible display screens or indicator lights.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray appears to be integrated into the rear section, beneath the large black vent, with a horizontal orientation and no visible adjustable guides or covers.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is located at the rear top center, just below the black vent, with no visible guides or trays.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visibly present or attached to the object.
